# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Write a Jenkins Pipeline that accepts build parameters from users and executes them as shell commands. Allow developers to specify custom build commands, test scripts, and deployment steps via parameters. This provides maximum flexibility for different project types.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
  agent any

  options {
    timestamps()
    ansiColor('xterm')
    disableConcurrentBuilds()
    buildDiscarder(logRotator(numToKeepStr: '25', daysToKeepStr: '30'))
  }

  parameters {
    choice(
      name: 'SHELL',
      choices: ['bash', 'sh', 'zsh'],
      description: 'Shell to execute scripts with (bash uses -euo pipefail).'
    )

    string(
      name: 'BUILD_COMMAND',
      defaultValue: 'echo "No build command provided."',
      description: 'Custom build command(s) to run. Can be multiple lines.'
    )

    text(
      name: 'TEST_SCRIPT',
      defaultValue: 'echo "No test script provided."',
      description: 'Custom test script to run. Can be multiple lines.'
    )

    text(
      name: 'DEPLOY_SCRIPT',
      defaultValue: 'echo "No deploy script provided."',
      description: 'Custom deployment steps to run. Can be multiple lines.'
    )

    booleanParam(
      name: 'RUN_BUILD',
      defaultValue: true,
      description: 'Run build stage.'
    )

    booleanParam(
      name: 'RUN_TESTS',
      defaultValue: true,
      description: 'Run test stage.'
    )

    booleanParam(
      name: 'RUN_DEPLOY',
      defaultValue: false,
      description: 'Run deploy stage.'
    )

    choice(
      name: 'DEPLOY_ENV',
      choices: ['dev', 'staging', 'prod'],
      description: 'Target environment (available as $DEPLOY_ENV).'
    )

    booleanParam(
      name: 'ALLOW_UNSAFE_COMMANDS',
      defaultValue: false,
      description: 'If false, blocks obviously dangerous tokens like rm -rf /, :(){:|:&};:, mkfs, dd to /dev/sdX, etc.'
    )
  }

  environment {
    DEPLOY_ENV = "${params.DEPLOY_ENV}"
    CI = "true"
  }

  stages {
    stage('Checkout') {
      steps {
        checkout scm
      }
    }

    stage('Validate Inputs') {
      steps {
        script {
          def allScripts = [
            BUILD_COMMAND: params.BUILD_COMMAND ?: '',
            TEST_SCRIPT: params.TEST_SCRIPT ?: '',
            DEPLOY_SCRIPT: params.DEPLOY_SCRIPT ?: ''
          ]

          allScripts.each { k, v ->
            if (v == null) allScripts[k] = ''
            if (v.size() > 20000) {
              error("${k} is too large. Limit is 20000 characters.")
            }
          }

          if (!params.ALLOW_UNSAFE_COMMANDS) {
            def bannedPatterns = [
              /(?i)\brm\s+-rf\s+\/\b/,
              /(?i)\brm\s+-fr\s+\/\b/,
              /(?i)\brm\s+-rf\s+--no-preserve-root\b/,
              /(?i)\bmkfs(\.\w+)?\b/,
              /(?i)\bdd\s+if=.*\s+of=\/dev\/sd[a-z]\b/,
              /(?i)\bdd\s+if=.*\s+of=\/dev\/nvme\d+n\d+\b/,
              /(?i):\s*\(\s*\)\s*\{\s*:\s*\|\s*:\s*&\s*\}\s*;\s*:/,
              /(?i)\bshutdown\b/,
              /(?i)\breboot\b/,
              /(?i)\bpoweroff\b/,
              /(?i)\bchown\s+-R\s+.*\s+\/\b/,
              /(?i)\bchmod\s+-R\s+7\d\d\s+\/\b/,
              /(?i)\bkill\s+-9\s+1\b/
            ]

            allScripts.each { k, v ->
              bannedPatterns.each { p ->
                if ((v ?: '') =~ p) {
                  error("Unsafe content detected in ${k}. Set ALLOW_UNSAFE_COMMANDS=true to override (not recommended).")
                }
              }
            }
          }
        }
      }
    }

    stage('Build') {
      when { expression { return params.RUN_BUILD } }
      steps {
        script {
          def cmd = params.BUILD_COMMAND ?: ''
          if (cmd.trim()) {
            runUserScript("Build", cmd)
          } else {
            echo "BUILD_COMMAND is empty; skipping."
          }
        }
      }
    }

    stage('Test') {
      when { expression { return params.RUN_TESTS } }
      steps {
        script {
          def cmd = params.TEST_SCRIPT ?: ''
          if (cmd.trim()) {
            runUserScript("Test", cmd)
          } else {
            echo "TEST_SCRIPT is empty; skipping."
          }
        }
      }
    }

    stage('Deploy') {
      when { expression { return params.RUN_DEPLOY } }
      steps {
        script {
          def cmd = params.DEPLOY_SCRIPT ?: ''
          if (cmd.trim()) {
            runUserScript("Deploy (${params.DEPLOY_ENV})", cmd)
          } else {
            echo "DEPLOY_SCRIPT is empty; skipping."
          }
        }
      }
    }
  }

  post {
    always {
      echo "Build result: ${currentBuild.currentResult}"
    }
    cleanup {
      cleanWs(deleteDirs: true, disableDeferredWipeout: true)
    }
  }
}

def runUserScript(String label, String content) {
  def shell = (params.SHELL ?: 'bash').trim()
  def scriptBody = (content ?: '').trim()

  if (!scriptBody) {
    echo "${label}: empty script; nothing to run."
    return
  }

  if (shell == 'bash') {
    sh(
      label: label,
      script: """#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
export DEPLOY_ENV="${params.DEPLOY_ENV}"
${scriptBody}
"""
    )
  } else if (shell == 'zsh') {
    sh(
      label: label,
      script: """#!/usr/bin/env zsh
set -eu
export DEPLOY_ENV="${params.DEPLOY_ENV}"
${scriptBody}
"""
    )
  } else {
    sh(
      label: label,
      script: """#!/usr/bin/env sh
set -eu
export DEPLOY_ENV="${params.DEPLOY_ENV}"
${scriptBody}
"""
    )
  }
}
